channel.title: International Investing on Sakthi Priyan H
channel.description: Recent content in International Investing on Sakthi Priyan H

item.title: Using Form 12BAA to Reduce Cashflow Drag on International Investments
item.description: How salaried Indians investing internationally via LRS can use Form 12BAA to reduce cashflow drag from TCS, optimize compounding, and avoid capital lock-in.

item.title: How to Invest in NASDAQ 100 from India (Mutual Funds, ETFs, and IBKR Guide)
item.description: Options to invest in the NASDAQ 100 index from India — covering mutual funds, Indian ETFs, and the LRS route via Interactive Brokers — along with a comparison of Indian apps vs IBKR with UCITS ETFs, buying cost, and taxation.

item.title: Cut Bank Forex Markup on INR to USD Using FX Retail | IBKR Funding, Forex Card, LRS
item.description: Indian investors lose 2-3% to hidden bank forex markup on every INR to USD transfer. Learn how to use FX Retail to negotiate lower rates for IBKR funding, forex card loading, and LRS remittances.

item.title: Funding Interactive Brokers from India Using FX Retail
item.description: How Indian investors can reduce the hidden forex markup cost when funding Interactive Brokers accounts by using FX Retail instead of the bank’s default remittance rate.

item.title: Invest in NASDAQ 100 from India
item.description: Options to invest in NASDAQ 100, process, cost and taxation

item.title: Invest in NASDAQ 100 from India
item.description: Complete guide on how Indian investors can invest in NASDAQ 100 index and benefit from US market growth.
